steps.action: Navigate to /compare and select Scenario A = fdn_bugfix_ui_org and Scenario B = fdn_bugfix_ui_org (Copy)
steps.expected: Diff loads with summary counts and side-by-side results
steps.observed: Diff Summary displayed +4 added / -0 removed / 0 moved / 0 changed; Scenario B list showed four employees tagged added

assertions.title: Bulk create via CSV import works end-to-end

steps.action: Use Import CSV flow with valid CSV rows in current scenario (fdn_bugfix_ui_org (Copy))
steps.expected: bulkCreateEmployees succeeds and imported employees appear in view
steps.observed: Four CSV employees imported and rendered in Org Chart (Alice/Bob/Carol/Dave), headcount total updated to 4

assertions.title: SpreadsheetView uses filteredEmployees from outlet context

steps.expected: View reads filteredEmployees from useOutletContext and passes it to AgGrid rowData
steps.observed: Confirmed in packages/client/src/components/views/SpreadsheetView.tsx: useOutletContext at line ~67 and rowData={filteredEmployees} at line ~236

steps.action: Runtime check in /spreadsheet with active filters
steps.observed: With Planned-only state active, spreadsheet rendered only the Planned employee row

evidence.network: No additional filter network calls observed; filtering behavior was client-side on loaded data

assertions.title: Status filters and search affect SpreadsheetView rows

steps.observed: Active employee (fdn_bugfix_ui Alice) disappeared; remaining rows were Open Req/Planned/Backfill

steps.action: Clear search and restore filter state

evidence.network: No filter-specific network requests observed; status/search filtering updated grid client-side

assertions.title: Combined status filter + search shows only matching rows

steps.action: Apply status filters to keep Planned only, then search for 'Bob'
steps.expected: Only rows matching both criteria are shown

steps.action: Keep Planned-only filter and search for 'Alice'
steps.observed: Grid showed empty-state message: 'No employees match the current filters.'

evidence.network: No combined-filter network requests observed; intersection behavior executed client-side

frictions.description: Import CSV button creates an ephemeral file input and opens OS picker; headless automation cannot directly drive native picker.
frictions.resolution: Hooked the created input in-page and dispatched a change event with a synthetic CSV File to execute the same import code path.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Compare diff path works, CSV bulk import succeeds, and Spreadsheet filters/search (including combined intersection and empty-state) behave correctly.
